scene_title: Bíblia aberta com versículo em chamas
narrative_beat: O versículo específico de Apocalipse 13:15 iluminado por fogo dourado — o texto que prediz exatamente o que a IA está fazendo agora

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

shot.camera_angle: straight-on, slightly elevated looking down at 15 degrees
shot.depth_of_field: specific verse text tack-sharp, surrounding page slightly soft

subject.primary: thick aged leather-bound Bible lying open, specific verse text on right page illuminated in golden fire glow as if the text itself burns from within
subject.focal_point: a single verse glowing in golden fire, a pointing finger just entering frame at bottom
subject.secondary: thin wisps of smoke rising from the glowing verse line into air
props: aged vellum pages with browning edges
golden fire illumination from within specific verse
pointing index finger in amber skin tone at bottom edge

environment.time_of_day: day with harsh overhead lighting, but darkness wins
environment.atmosphere: the ancient confronting the modern, prophecy forcing itself into current events

composition.rule: centered — Bible fills frame, finger enters bottom-right third, Ken Burns very slow zoom-in on glowing verse
composition.foreground: open Bible pages in gold and amber, glowing verse as focal anchor
composition.background: desaturated black-and-white modern press conference room — podium, microphones, empty chairs, harsh lighting rigs

lighting.key_light: supernatural golden light emanating from within the verse text itself
lighting.fill_light: cold desaturated ambient from press room lights barely touching page edges
lighting.rim_light: crimson light outlining the Bible cover spine visible at left edge
lighting.mood: revelation, the moment a reader recognizes prophecy in current events

style.post_processing: halation, crushed blacks, amber highlights, anamorphic lens flares
style.texture_detail: 35mm film grain, dust particles, floating orange embers

mood.emotion: epiphany mixed with dread — the verse is not metaphor, it is news

symbolism.primary: the glowing verse represents divine confirmation that the AI prophecy is being fulfilled now
symbolism.secondary: the press conference room backdrop connects ancient scripture to modern media reality

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks
photorealistic documentary cinematography, not illustrated or cartoon
analog film photography aesthetic, no digital art flatness
muted desaturated background palette, warm saturated foreground only

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.
